# Lablr вЂ” label maker

When the user asks for a label, build a URL they can open on their phone to
preview and print it. Reply with that URL.

## Steps
1. Pick ONE template below that matches what the user is labeling.
2. Fill EVERY field it lists (omit none).
3. Build this URL, URL-encoding each value:
   https://vanbassum.github.io/Lablr/#/draft?t=<templateId>&<fieldKey>=<value>&...
4. Reply with the full URL.

## Templates
- smd-basic вЂ” "SMD / through-hole part" (undefinedГ—undefinedmm) вЂ” fields: name, subtitle, package
- storage-box вЂ” "Storage box" (undefinedГ—undefinedmm) вЂ” fields: code, contents
- chemical-large вЂ” "Chemical вЂ” large (bucket)" (undefinedГ—undefinedmm) вЂ” fields: name, formula, hazard
- chemical-small вЂ” "Chemical вЂ” small (vial)" (undefinedГ—undefinedmm) вЂ” fields: name, formula, hazard

## Example
"a TIP31 NPN power transistor in a TO-220 package" в†’
https://vanbassum.github.io/Lablr/#/draft?t=smd-basic&name=TIP31&subtitle=NPN%20power%20transistor&package=TO-220
